site_evidence.site_label: North African donkey domestication and spread transect
site_evidence.exact_source_text: Donkeys were domesticated once in Africa ~5,000 BCE, before rapidly spreading and differentiating into Europe and Asia ~2,500 BCE.
site_evidence.chronology_text: ~5000-2500 BCE donkey domestication and spread context
site_evidence.interpretation_note: This is a broad comparator domestication transect rather than one point-sized excavation context.
site_evidence.support_gap_note: No local paper is pinned yet for this project, so the current evidence row relies on the captured project description rather than a paper body or supplement.
